title: StarOre lite
description: A simple modpack that ads visual mods. Made for StarOre server
body:
The StarOre Lite Modpack is a recommended but _optional_ modpack **designed to enhance** the vanilla Minecraft **experience on the StarOre server**. For short it introduces visual quality and performance improvements over vanilla Minecraft.

### **This is the Lite version, if you're looking for the** full version, you can download it [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/starore-plus).

While installing this modpack is not required to join the server, **it is highly recommended for an improved** **experience**.

Credits:
Resource pack:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net
Fresh Animations: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations
